zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Grosvenor於1407年出生在英國英格蘭爾赫爾姆 瓦爾費爾德時，他的父親Thomas GROSVENOR30歲，母親Joan de Venables22歲。他於1432年與Joan Eaton在英國爾伊頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1476年在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾瑟 奧福。

nameMeanings.name: Grosvenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from French gros ‘big, great’ + veneur ‘hunter’.

History: This is the name of one of the wealthiest families in Britain, which holds the title Duke of Westminster. They have been long established in Cheshire, with strong links with the city of Chester. One of the earliest recorded bearers of the name was Robert le Grosvenor of Budworth, who was granted lands by the Earl of Chester in 1160. The family's fortunes were founded by Thomas Grosvenor (born 1656), who in 1677 married an heiress, Mary Davies, whose inheritance included Ebury Farm, Middlesex. This now forms an area of central London that includes Grosvenor Square and Belgrave Square.

variants.name: Gravenor
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French grand ‘big, tall’ + veneor ‘hunter’. Compare Grosvenor .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Grosvenor was born in 1407, in Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas GROSVENOR, was 30 and his mother, Joan de Venables, was 22. He married Joan Eaton in 1432, in Eaton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1476, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Nether Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Grosvenor est né en 1407, à Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas GROSVENOR, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan de Venables, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan Eaton en 1432, à Eaton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1476, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Nether Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Grosvenor 1407 in Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas GROSVENOR 30 und seine Mutter Joan de Venables 22. Er hat 1432 in Eaton, Cheshire, England Joan Eaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Grosvenor è nato il nel 1407 nel Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas GROSVENOR, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Venables, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joan Eaton nel 1432, nel Eaton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1476, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Nether Peover, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Grosvenorが1407年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハルメ ワルフィールドで生まれた時，父Thomas GROSVENORは30歳，母Joan de Venablesは22歳であった。1432年にイギリスチェシュアイアエアトンでJoan Eatonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1476年に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアネスエル ペオバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Grosvenor(이)가 1407년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 훌 월필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas GROSVENOR(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Venables(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1432년 영국 체실르 이턴에서 Joan Eaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1476년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 네터 프오버에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Grosvenor родился в 1407 г. в местности хулм валфиелд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas GROSVENOR было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Venables, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Eaton в 1432 г. в местности эатон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1476 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности нетир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
